title: Steven Atkinson
text: Home * People * Steven Atkinson Steven Atkinson , an Australian university graduate in mathematics and computer science and hobby programmer from Brisbane [1] . He is author of the chess GUI Scid vs. PC , written in Tcl/Tk , which acts as front end of a database back end, a fork of Shane Hudson's Chess Information Database ( SCID ).
